title: asperula longiflora var. jordanii
intro: Asperula longiflora var. jordanii, also known as Jordan's Woodruff or Asperula jordanii, is a flowering plant species within the genus Asperula. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include being a source of salicylic acid, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Asperula longiflora var. jordanii include its potential anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in relieving pain and reducing inflammation. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas and tinctures, which are often used to treat fever, headaches, and other minor ailments.
